deviation_log_entries: DEV-03-WAL-TASK-GC-GAP (LOW): Q2 保守 — 只加 self._wal_drain_task 强引用, 不改 close() cancel+await. close() 清理缺口是 pre-existing 竞态非本改动引入; 加 cancel+await 需独立 shutdown-during-drain 失败模式测试超 Task 10 契约. 完整生命周期硬化留未来 lifecycle plan.

DEV-03-TDD-ORDER-CLARIFICATION (LOW, codex L1): genuine code change 严格 test-first (Track 5 RED TypeError 6-arg → 6/7 GREEN; Track 6 Test C RED AttributeError → Task 9 GREEN); invariant/characterization 测试 (Track 1/2/3 + Test A/B) 首跑即绿属预期. 签名迁移例外: Task 6/7/8 + 9/10 各原子合一 commit (单独提交留破损中间态).
